general.descriptionTextModule: Manage the Javascript files blocked per route
general.messageSaveError: The settings could not be saved.
general.messageLoadError: The settings could not be loaded.

home.label: Home page
home.helpText: Comma-separated list of script name fragments to block on the home page.

detail.label: Product detail page
detail.helpText: Comma-separated list of script name fragments to block on the product detail page.

landing.label: Landing page
landing.helpText: Comma-separated list of script name fragments to block on native landing pages.

navigation.label: Category / navigation page
navigation.helpText: Comma-separated list of script name fragments to block on category and navigation pages (incl. category landing pages and product listings).

cms.label: Free CMS page
cms.helpText: Comma-separated list of script name fragments to block on freely created shop pages (e.g. terms, about us).

checkout.label: Checkout process
checkout.helpText: Comma-separated list of script name fragments to block during checkout (cart, confirm, finish, etc.).

account.label: Customer account area
account.helpText: Comma-separated list of script name fragments to block in the customer account area.

search.label: Search results page
search.helpText: Comma-separated list of script name fragments to block on the search results page.

fallback.label: All other pages (fallback)
fallback.helpText: Comma-separated list of script name fragments to block on all other pages (e.g. error pages, newsletter, wishlist).
